THE EXCLUSIVE PLATFORM FOR:

What is slowpitch softball?

Understanding Slowpitch Softball

Slowpitch softball is a popular variation of baseball that emphasizes recreational play and social interaction. The main difference lies in the pitching style - the ball must be thrown in an arc between 6 and 12 feet high, making it easier to hit than baseball or fastpitch softball.

Unlike baseball, the softball is larger (11 or 12 inches in circumference) and the field dimensions are smaller, with bases typically 65 feet apart instead of 90 feet. Games are usually seven innings long, and teams often field 10 players instead of 9, with the additional player serving as a short fielder.

The sport is designed to be more accessible and enjoyable for players of all skill levels and ages. With its emphasis on hitting and fielding rather than pitching dominance, slowpitch softball promotes higher scoring games and more active participation from all team members.

Slo-Pitch Central Features

THE RECOMMENDED PLATFORM FOR SLO-PITCH LEAGUES AND TOURNAMENTS.

Free To Use

We don't charge you to use our platform. We make money through advertising and sponsorships.

Easy to Use

We've made it easy to use. You can create your league and schedule in minutes.

Teams Can Report Their Own Scores

Your teams can report their own scores. No need for complex passwords or accounts. Set a shortcode for them and it's saved forever.

Can Upload any CSV Schedule

Using a program to schedule your games? No problem. You can upload any CSV schedule and we'll parse it and display it for you.

Reschedule, Postpone Games & Announcements

You can reschedule games, postpone games, and make announcements to your players about these things quickly.

Playoff Mode

We have a playoff mode that allows you to set up and track your playoff games.

Find and explore detailed information about various ballparks and venues for your slo-pitch softball events.

Budget Generator

Create a comprehensive budget for your slo-pitch softball tournament or event with our easy-to-use generator.

Round Robin Generator

Quickly generate fair and balanced round-robin schedules for your slo-pitch softball tournaments.

Tournament Bracket Generator

Create single or double elimination tournament brackets for playoffs and championship events.

Use Tournament Bracket Generator

Printable Scorecards

Download our free baseball and slo-pitch softball Scorecards. Available in both PSD and PNG formats, perfect for keeping track of your game statistics.

Use Printable Scorecards

Statistics Calculators

Calculate batting average, on-base percentage, slugging percentage, and more with our free baseball/slo-pitch softball statistics calculators.
